title: Soul Campfire
description: Changes wood in the soul campfire to the warped stem.
body:
# Soul Campfire **Hi!** This pack changes the texture of Soul Campfire! The oak logs don't make sense to me, so I replaced them with small, warped stems. This way, Soul Campfire looks better in the Nether!
**Hope you like it!**
